footerProjectSub: Chunked corpus · FAISS · cited answers · FastAPI
title: RAG Document QA
summary: Question answering over a fixed document corpus: chunk, embed, retrieve with FAISS, answer with an OpenAI-compatible model, and return explicit sources on every response.
metaDescription: Document RAG with ingestion, FAISS retrieval, FastAPI /ask, source citations, Docker deployment, and an interactive browser demo.
limitations: Fixed corpus only; the system does not browse the open web.
Retrieval quality constrains answer quality — weak matches need human review.
LLM behaviour still needs inspection even when sources are returned.

recruiter.summary: End-to-end RAG: chunked corpus, FAISS retrieval, FastAPI /ask with cited sources, and an embedding/index contract enforced at startup so serving cannot silently drift from the indexed model.
recruiter.heroNote: Interactive demo on this site posts to the public API. If the browser blocks the request, use API docs or curl — often CORS or API key on the server.
recruiter.demoMetaDescription: Ask questions against the demo policy corpus via POST /ask — same API contract as production.
recruiter.interactiveDemoEyebrow: RAG Document QA — browser demo against the live /ask endpoint.
recruiter.interactiveDemoLead: Pick an example or type a question against the eight-document policy corpus. Answers and cited sources come from the live API — useful when reviewers want evidence, not slides.
recruiter.interactiveDemoScopeNote: Demo corpus is the fixed sample set in data/raw_docs/; production work scopes your documents, auth, and hosting boundary.
recruiter.footerProjectSub: Portfolio artifact · live API on VPS

commercial.summary: Internal document QA you can scope as a pilot: policies and runbooks become the retrieval corpus, answers stay tied to cited passages, and the same FastAPI surface integrates into support or ops tooling.
commercial.heroNote: Public reference deployment for evaluation. Production pilots pin corpus, auth, VPC/VPN placement, and your IdP — not this static page alone.
commercial.demoPageTitle: RAG Document QA — try the demo
commercial.demoMetaDescription: Ask against the reference corpus on the live API; same retrieval + citation contract as a scoped pilot.
commercial.interactiveDemoEyebrow: Reference deployment — fixed demo corpus, honest pilot boundaries.
commercial.interactiveDemoLead: Use example questions or type your own against the reference eight-document corpus. Responses include cited sources so technical stakeholders can verify grounding before a larger build.
commercial.interactiveDemoScopeNote: Reference corpus only (sample policies in data/raw_docs/) — not a consumer chat product. Production pilots define your corpus, access controls, and hosting in scope.
commercial.pageTitle: RAG Document QA — pilot document intelligence
commercial.metaDescription: Pilot-sized document QA: retrieval, cited answers, and FastAPI integration — scoped engagements, not generic chat SaaS.
limitations: Not a hosted multi-tenant chat product or open-web assistant.
Answer quality depends on corpus quality, chunking, and retrieval — pilots define acceptance checks.
Production work includes auth, network boundary, and corpus governance beyond this reference UI.
commercial.footerProjectSub: Client evaluation demo · same API surface as pilots
